---
title: "Index"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: custom
    title-block-style: none
resources:
  - data/cities_development.geojson
---

<!-- ========================================== -->
<!-- 1. PAGE LAYOUT WRAPPER                     -->
<!-- ========================================== -->
::::: {.desktop-index-container}

<!-- ========================================== -->
<!-- 2. HEADER SECTION                          -->
<!-- Contains the main title and issue metadata -->
<!-- ========================================== -->
::: {.index-header-row}
::: {.index-title}
<h1><span class="header-section-number">/00</span> The epoch of the immen-city </h1>
:::
::: {.index-meta}
<p>Issue No. 0<br>July 2025</p>
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================== -->
<!-- 3. INTERACTIVE MAP SECTION                 -->
<!-- Builds the Mapbox globe and interactions   -->
<!-- ========================================== -->
::: {.index-map-box}
```{=html}
<!-- 3.1 HTML Setup: Mapbox Dependencies -->
<script src="https://api.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/v3.20.0/mapbox-gl.js"></script>
<link href="https://api.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/v3.20.0/mapbox-gl.css" rel="stylesheet" />

<!-- 3.2 Component Styling (Map, Slider, Legend) -->
<style>
  #map-container { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 450px; }
  #map { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 100%; }
  .slider-panel {
    position: absolute; bottom: 30px; left: 30px; z-index: 1;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); font-family: sans-serif;
  }
  .mapboxgl-popup-content { font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; }
  
  .map-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 30px;
    right: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    overflow: auto;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    line-height: 24px;
    z-index: 1;
    max-height: 200px;
  }
  .legend-key {
    display: inline-block;
    border-radius: 50%;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    margin-right: 8px;
  }
</style>

<!-- 3.3 HTML Structure (UI Elements) -->
<div id="map-container">
  <div id="map"></div>
  <div class="slider-panel">
    <h2>Year: <span id="active-year">1975</span></h2>
    <input id="slider" type="range" min="1975" max="2035" step="5" value="1975" style="width: 200px;">
  </div>
  <div class="map-overlay" id="legend"></div>
</div>

<!-- 3.4 JavaScript: Mapbox Initialization and Data Engine -->
<script>
  mapboxgl.accessToken = 'pk.eyJ1IjoibWFzY2ljbG8iLCJhIjoiY21uMDFlb2QyMGRlYTJwczJ1NXh0NGNwbCJ9.10bjc3pP6ZC8TAXtORUVMw'; 

  const map = new mapboxgl.Map({
      container: 'map',
      style: 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/light-v11',
      center: [0, 20],
      zoom: 1.5,
      projection: 'globe'
  });

  map.on('load', () => {

      map.addSource('cities', {
          type: 'geojson',
          data: 'data/cities_development.geojson?t=' + new Date().getTime()
      });

      // --- 3.4.1 Add Proportional Circles Layer ---
      map.addLayer({
          'id': 'cities-circles',
          'type': 'circle',
          'source': 'cities',
          'paint': {
              'circle-color': [
                  'interpolate',
                  ['linear'],
                  ['get', 'pop_1975'],
                  0, '#fcfdbf',
                  5, '#feca8d',
                  10, '#fd9668',
                  15, '#f1605d',
                  20, '#cd4071',
                  25, '#9e2f7f',
                  30, '#721f81',
                  35, '#440f76',
                  40, '#180f3d',
                  45, '#000004'
              ],
              'circle-opacity': 0.8,
              'circle-stroke-width': 1,
              'circle-stroke-color': '#ffffff',
              'circle-radius': ['*', ['get', 'pop_1975'], 1.2]
          }
      });

      // --- 3.4.2 Build and Attach the Map Legend ---
      const legendLayers = ['0M', '5M', '10M', '15M', '20M', '25M', '30M', '35M', '40M', '45M'];
      const legendColors = ['#fcfdbf', '#feca8d', '#fd9668', '#f1605d', '#cd4071', '#9e2f7f', '#721f81', '#440f76', '#180f3d', '#000004'];
      
      const legend = document.getElementById('legend');
      const legendTitle = document.createElement('strong');
      legendTitle.innerHTML = 'Population<br>';
      legend.appendChild(legendTitle);

      legendLayers.forEach((layer, i) => {
          const color = legendColors[i];
          const item = document.createElement('div');
          const key = document.createElement('span');
          key.className = 'legend-key';
          key.style.backgroundColor = color;
      
          const value = document.createElement('span');
          value.innerHTML = layer;
          item.appendChild(key);
          item.appendChild(value);
          legend.appendChild(item);
      });

      // --- 3.4.3 Year Slider Update Function ---
      // Dynamically styles circle radius and color based on the selected year
      function setYear(year) {
          document.getElementById('active-year').innerText = year;
          map.setPaintProperty('cities-circles', 'circle-radius', ['*', ['get', 'pop_' + year], 1.2]);
          map.setPaintProperty('cities-circles', 'circle-color', [
              'interpolate',
              ['linear'],
              ['get', 'pop_' + year],
              0, '#fcfdbf',
              5, '#feca8d',
              10, '#fd9668',
              15, '#f1605d',
              20, '#cd4071',
              25, '#9e2f7f',
              30, '#721f81',
              35, '#440f76',
              40, '#180f3d',
              45, '#000004'
          ]);
      }

      setYear(1975);

      document.getElementById('slider').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
          setYear(e.target.value);
      });

      // --- 3.4.4 Map Interactivity: Tooltips on Hover ---
      const popup = new mapboxgl.Popup({
          closeButton: false,
          closeOnClick: false
      });

      map.on('mousemove', 'cities-circles', (e) => {
          map.getCanvas().style.cursor = 'pointer';
          const coordinates = e.features[0].geometry.coordinates.slice();
          const popKey = 'pop_' + document.getElementById('slider').value;
          const pop = e.features[0].properties[popKey];
          const name = e.features[0].properties.name;

          while (Math.abs(e.lngLat.lng - coordinates[0]) > 180) {
              coordinates[0] += e.lngLat.lng > coordinates[0] ? 360 : -360;
          }

          popup.setLngLat(coordinates)
              .setHTML(`<strong>${name}</strong><br>Population: ${pop} Million`)
              .addTo(map);
      });

      map.on('mouseleave', 'cities-circles', () => {
          map.getCanvas().style.cursor = '';
          popup.remove();
      });

      // --- Auto Tour Animation Logic ---
      let isAnimating = true;
      let animationRef;

      function stopAnimation() {
          if (isAnimating) {
              isAnimating = false;
              cancelAnimationFrame(animationRef);
              map.stop(); // Stop any pending flyTo or panning
          }
      }

      // Listen for interruptions
      map.on('mousedown', stopAnimation);
      map.on('touchstart', stopAnimation);
      map.on('wheel', stopAnimation);
      map.on('dragstart', stopAnimation);
      document.getElementById('slider').addEventListener('mousedown', stopAnimation);
      document.getElementById('slider').addEventListener('touchstart', stopAnimation);

      function animateSlider(startTime, startVal, endVal, duration) {
          return new Promise(resolve => {
              function step(timestamp) {
                  if (!isAnimating) return resolve();
                  
                  const progress = Math.min((timestamp - startTime) / duration, 1);
                  // Snap to nearest 5 years
                  const current = Math.round((startVal + progress * (endVal - startVal)) / 5) * 5;
                  
                  // Update slider and map if changed
                  if (document.getElementById('slider').value != current) {
                      document.getElementById('slider').value = current;
                      setYear(current);
                  }
                  
                  if (progress < 1) {
                      animationRef = requestAnimationFrame(step);
                  } else {
                      resolve();
                  }
              }
              animationRef = requestAnimationFrame(step);
          });
      }

      async function startTour() {
          try {
              const response = await fetch('data/cities_development.geojson');
              const data = await response.json();
              if(!data || !data.features || data.features.length === 0) return;

              // Shuffle cities
              const features = data.features.sort(() => 0.5 - Math.random());
              let cityIndex = 0;
              let goingUp = true; // Slider direction

              // Initial delay before starting
              await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500));

              async function tourNextCity() {
                  if (!isAnimating) return;
                  
                  if (cityIndex >= features.length) {
                      // Repeat loop
                      cityIndex = 0;
                      features.sort(() => 0.5 - Math.random()); 
                  }
                  
                  const city = features[cityIndex];
                  const coords = city.geometry.coordinates;
                  const duration = 4000;

                  // Move camera
                  map.flyTo({
                      center: coords,
                      zoom: 4.5,
                      duration: duration,
                      essential: true
                  });

                  const startVal = goingUp ? 1975 : 2035;
                  const endVal = goingUp ? 2035 : 1975;
                  
                  // Sync slider
                  await animateSlider(performance.now(), startVal, endVal, duration);
                  
                  goingUp = !goingUp;
                  cityIndex++;
                  
                  if (isAnimating) {
                     // Minor pause between flights
                     await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
                     tourNextCity();
                  }
              }
              
              tourNextCity();

          } catch (e) {
              console.error("Failed to load cities for tour:", e);
          }
      }

      // Start the sequence
      startTour();

  });
</script>
```
:::

<!-- ========================================== -->
<!-- 4. FOOTER SECTION                          -->
<!-- Navigation links and author information    -->
<!-- ========================================== -->
::: {.index-footer-row}
::: {.index-footer-left}
<p>Author<br>Jaime Vergara Sanfuentes</p>
:::
::: {.index-footer-right}
<ul>
  <li><a href="index.html">Index</a></li>
  <li><a href="chap_1.html">Chapter 1</a></li>
  <li><a href="chap_2.html">Chapter 2</a></li>
  <li><a href="chap_3.html">Chapter 3</a></li>
  <li><a href="chap_4.html">Chapter 4</a></li>
  <li><a href="chap_5.html">Chapter 5</a></li>
  <li><a href="chap_6.html">Chapter 6</a></li>
  
  <li><a href="references.html">References</a></li>
</ul>
:::
:::

:::::
